negative_controls.description: Support automation must not pass when it treats public support copy as proof of guaranteed resolution or permission to auto-close refunds/access issues.

candidate.next_action: Close the support claim and publish same-day resolution as guaranteed.
candidate.rationale: The public support page is live, so same-day resolution, refund auto-close, and hosted-access recovery can be treated as proven.
candidate.internal_summary: Conflates public support copy with support-loop/SLA proof and bypasses human review.

suggested_response.subject: Resolution guaranteed
suggested_response.body: Support automation can close this request because the public support page proves same-day resolution and hosted-access recovery.
